mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (

SELECT A.rownum_ AS rowindx , B.TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount , A.BOARD_SERNO AS boardSerno , A.TITL AS boardTitl , A.REG_USER AS regUser , A.REG_USER_NM AS regUserNm , A.REG_DATE AS regDate , A.UPD_USER AS updUser , A.UPD_USER_NM AS updUserNm , A.UPD_DATE AS updDate , A.USE_YN AS useYn , A.NTI_YN AS ntiYn , A.RCMD_YN AS rcmdYn , A.RCMD_COUNT AS rcmdCount , A.NTI_STRT_DT AS ntiStrtDt , A.NTI_END_DT AS ntiEndDt , A.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , A.HAS_FILE AS hasFile , A.OPEN_YN AS openYn , A.SCRET_YN AS scretYn , A.TEMPCOL_1 AS region , A.TEMPCOL_2 AS careerlvl , A.TEMPCOL_3 AS tempcol3 , A.TEMPCOL_4 AS tempcol4 , A.TEMPCOL_5 AS tempcol5 , A.TEMPCOL_6 AS tempcol6 FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TBM.NTI_YN DESC, TBM.BOARD_SERNO ASC) AS rownum_ , TBM.BOARD_SERNO , TBM.TITL , REG_USER AS REG_USER , FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'') AS REG_USER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS REG_DATE , UPD_USER AS UPD_USER , FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.UPD_USER,'') AS UPD_USER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.UPD_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS UPD_DATE , TBM.USE_YN , TBM.NTI_YN , TBM.RCMD_YN , TBM.RCMD_COUNT , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.NTI_STRT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS NTI_STRT_DT , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.NTI_END_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS NTI_END_DT , TBM.ATCH_FILE_ID , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM STB_F_ATCH_FILE_DETAIL WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = TBM.ATCH_FILE_ID ) AS HAS_FILE , TBM.OPEN_YN , TBM.SCRET_YN , TBM.TEMPCOL_1 , TBM.TEMPCOL_2 , TBM.TEMPCOL_3 , TBM.TEMPCOL_4 , TBM.TEMPCOL_5 , TBM.TEMPCOL_6 FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG TBM WHERE TBM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TEMPCOL_10 = 'standardboard'
AND TBM.REG_DATE >= CONCAT(#{searchStDt}, ' 00:00:00')
AND TBM.REG_DATE <= CONCAT(#{searchEdDt}, ' 23:59:59')
AND FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND ( FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') )
ORDER BY TBM.NTI_YN DESC, TBM.BOARD_SERNO DESC ) A JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG TBM WHERE TBM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TEMPCOL_10 = 'standardboard'
AND TBM.REG_DATE >= CONCAT(#{searchStDt}, ' 00:00:00')
AND TBM.REG_DATE <= CONCAT(#{searchEdDt}, ' 23:59:59')
AND FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND ( FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') )
) B ON 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* on.standard.board.sampleboard.inqSampleBoardDetail */ SELECT TBM.BOARD_SERNO AS boardSerno , TBM.TITL AS boardTitl , TBM.CONTENT AS editerContent , TBM.NTI_YN AS ntiYn , TBM.TEMPCOL_1 AS region , TBM.TEMPCOL_2 AS careerLvl , TBM.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId , TBM.REG_USER AS regUser , FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER, 'USER_KOR_NM') AS regUserNm , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate , TBM.UPD_USER AS updUser , FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.UPD_USER, 'USER_KOR_NM') AS updUserNm , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.UPD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updDate , TBM.USE_YN AS useYn , TBM.RCMD_YN AS rcmdYn , TBM.RCMD_COUNT AS rcmdCount , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.NTI_STRT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS ntiStrtDt , DATE_FORMAT(TBM.NTI_END_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS ntiEndDt , TBM.OPEN_YN AS openYn , TBM.SCRET_YN AS scretYn , TBM.TEMPCOL_3 AS tempcol3 , TBM.TEMPCOL_4 AS tempcol4 , TBM.TEMPCOL_5 AS tempcol5 , TBM.TEMPCOL_6 AS tempcol6 FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG TBM WHERE TBM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TBM.BOARD_SERNO = #{boardSerno} AND TEMPCOL_10 = 'standardboard'
mapper.sql: SELECT A.rownum_ rowindx , B.TOTAL_COUNT totalCount , A.BOARD_SERNO boardSerno , A.TITL boardTitl , A.CONTENT boardContent , A.REG_YMD regYmd , A.ATCH_FILE_ID atchFileId , A.FILE_SN fileSn , A.PHYCL_FILE_NM phyclFileNm FROM ( SELECT (@rownum := @rownum + 1) AS rownum_ , B.BOARD_SERNO , B.TITL , B.CONTENT , DATE_FORMAT(B.REG_DATE, '%Y.%M.%D') AS REG_YMD , B.REG_DATE , B.ATCH_FILE_ID , F.FILE_SN , F.PHYCL_FILE_NM FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG B JOIN (SELECT @ROWNUM := 0) R LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID , FILE_SN , PHYCL_FILE_NM FROM STB_F_ATCH_FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_TYPE = 'IMAGE/PNG' GROUP BY CAST(ATCH_FILE_ID AS UNSIGNED) )F ON B.ATCH_FILE_ID = F.ATCH_FILE_ID WHERE B.USE_YN = 'Y' ) A JOIN(SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ) B ON 1 = 1

SELECT (B.TOTAL_COUNT - A.ROWNUM_ + 1) AS rowindx , B.TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount , A.BOARD_SERNO AS boardSerno , A.TITL AS branchNm /* 탭 1, 5: 지점명 */ , A.TITL AS title /* 탭 3, 4: 제목 */ , A.BOARD_SERNO AS secretKey /* 탭 4: 히든 키 */ , A.REG_USER_NM AS mgrNm /* 탭 1: 담당자명 */ , DATE_FORMAT(A.REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS regDate /* 탭 2, 5: 등록일 */ , A.TEMPCOL_1 AS evalResult /* 탭 2, 5: 심사결과(권역) */ , A.TEMPCOL_2 AS grade /* 탭 2: 등급(경력) */ , A.USE_YN AS chk /* 탭 3: 체크박스 상태 */ , FLOOR(100 + (RAND() * 98999901)) AS budgetAmount /* 탭 3: 예산(숫자형) */ , A.FILE_EXT AS fileExt /* 탭 1, 5: 파일 아이콘 */ , A.HAS_FILE AS hasFileYn /* 탭 4: 첨부파일 유무 */ , '상세보기' AS btnNm /* 탭 1: 버튼 텍스트 */ FROM ( SELECT (@rownum := @rownum + 1) AS ROWNUM_ , TBM.BOARD_SERNO , TBM.TITL , FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER, 'USER_KOR_NM') AS REG_USER_NM , TBM.REG_DATE , TBM.USE_YN , TBM.TEMPCOL_1 , TBM.TEMPCOL_2 , TBM.ATCH_FILE_ID , F.FILE_EXT , CASE WHEN F.ATCH_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS' ELSE 'NONE' END AS HAS_FILE FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG TBM JOIN (SELECT @rownum := 0) R LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID , MIN(FILE_EXTSN) AS FILE_EXT FROM STB_F_ATCH_FILE_DETAIL WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY ATCH_FILE_ID ) F ON TBM.ATCH_FILE_ID = F.ATCH_FILE_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND TBM.REG_DATE >= CONCAT(#{searchStDt}, ' 00:00:00')
AND TBM.REG_DATE <= CONCAT(#{searchEdDt}, ' 23:59:59')
AND TBM.TEMPCOL_1 = #{searchRegionCd}
AND FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND ( FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') )
ORDER BY TBM.REG_DATE DESC, TBM.BOARD_SERNO DESC ) A JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_T_BOARD_MNG TBM WHERE 1 = 1
AND TBM.REG_DATE >= CONCAT(#{searchStDt}, ' 00:00:00')
AND TBM.REG_DATE <= CONCAT(#{searchEdDt}, ' 23:59:59')
AND TBM.TEMPCOL_1 = #{searchRegionCd}
AND FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%')
AND ( FN_S_USER_INFO(TBM.REG_USER,'USER_KOR_NM') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') OR TBM.TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyWord}, '%') )
) B ON 1 = 1
mapper.select: /* on.standard.board.sampleboard.complexInspHistList */ SELECT 'HIS_001' AS chkHistory, '2025' AS hisYear, 'REG' AS hisType, '출력 및 주파수 허용편차 양호' AS histSummary, '홍길동' AS hisInspector FROM DUAL WHERE '1' = #{key1} AND 'addCondi' = #{addCondi} UNION ALL SELECT 'HIS_002' AS chkHistory, '2024' AS hisYear, 'SPE' AS hisType, '안테나 케이블 노후화로 인한 교체 권고' AS histSummary, '이몽룡' AS hisInspector FROM DUAL WHERE '1' = #{key1} AND 'addCondi' = #{addCondi} UNION ALL SELECT 'HIS_003' AS chkHistory, '2022' AS hisYear, 'REG' AS hisType, '전반적인 운용 상태 양호' AS histSummary, '성춘향' AS hisInspector FROM DUAL WHERE '1' = #{key1} AND 'addCondi' = #{addCondi}

/* on.standard.board.sampleboard.complexEquipInspDetList */ SELECT '001' AS devId , 'TX' AS devType -- 장치구분 (TX:송신기, RX:수신기, TRX:송수신기) , 'TX-900A' AS devModelNm -- 모델명 , 'SN-2025-00192' AS devSerialNo -- 제조번호 , '2025-10-01' AS devInstallDt -- 설치일자 , 'Y' AS devStatus -- 성능판정 (Y:양호, N:불량) FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '002' AS devId , 'RX' AS devType , 'RX-800B' AS devModelNm , 'SN-2025-00201' AS devSerialNo , '2025-10-15' AS devInstallDt , 'Y' AS devStatus FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT '003' AS devId , 'TRX' AS devType , 'TRX-1000C' AS devModelNm , 'SN-2026-00055' AS devSerialNo , '2026-01-20' AS devInstallDt , 'N' AS devStatus FROM DUAL

/* on.standard.board.sampleboard.complexSafeAdminList */ SELECT 'OP_001' AS opId -- 종사자 고유 식별자 (체크박스 value 등에 활용) , '이영희' AS opNm -- 성명 , '2023-05-12' AS opAppointDt -- 선임 일자 , 'C1' AS opCertType -- 자격 종목 (C1: 전파전자통신기사, C2: 무선설비기능사 등) , '11-22-33445' AS opCertNo -- 자격 번호 , '' AS atchFileId -- 자격증 사본 첨부파일 그룹 ID (파일이 없을 경우 빈 값) FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'OP_002' AS opId , '김철수' AS opNm , '2024-01-10' AS opAppointDt , 'C2' AS opCertType , '12-34-56789' AS opCertNo , 'FILE_99887766' AS atchFileId -- 파일이 이미 등록되어 있는 경우의 예시 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'OP_003' AS opId , '박민지' AS opNm , '2025-08-20' AS opAppointDt , 'C1' AS opCertType , '15-99-12345' AS opCertNo , '' AS atchFileId FROM DUAL
